name: @vexa/mixed-pipeline
description: Mixed-lane pipeline: pyannote segmenter (cut-only) + shared buffer/whisper + hints namer → transcript.v1. Single mixed audio stream; names from time-windowed hints. No diarization/clustering.

scripts.test: tsx src/confirm-loop.golden.test.ts && tsx src/naming.smoke.test.ts && tsx src/claim.smoke.test.ts && tsx src/priority.smoke.test.ts && tsx src/concurrency.smoke.test.ts
